```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Speed up serialization and deserialization in hot paths.
---
Task:
Profile encode/decode costs and optimize formats, schema, and object mapping overhead.
Requirements:
Measure payload sizes, CPU time per operation, allocation cost, and transport impact.
Constraints:
Maintain wire compatibility, data fidelity, and backward/forward schema handling.
Success Criteria:
Provide before/after throughput and latency metrics with compatibility checks passed.
```
